data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIn: I keep coming back to this same place!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDe: I'm already having trouble, and then\nyou have to beat me? It's not fair!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo: It's full of doors here!\nIt's too small and dark in here! Help!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIn: I don't know what's going on here.\nI'm starting to feel sad...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo: I know I'm weak!\nAnd, I have no sense of direction!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntr: I don't get it. What would anyone want\nwith a house this bizarre?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanDefe: I don't get it.\nHow did I lose?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost: I don't get it.\nHow many traps are in this house?\pYou may be the one to solve that.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is cool.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!
